steps.title: Find the multiplier
steps.content:
The choices all have the form $f(x)=kx$, so use one table row to find $k$:
$$
k=\frac{1{,}008}{560}=1.8
$$

steps.title: Check another row
steps.content:
Confirm with the other listed value:
$$
1.8(840)=1{,}512
$$
So the function can be $f(x)=1.8x$.

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The equation $f(x)=1.8x$ uses the correct gallons-per-square-foot multiplier. The answer is B.
